---
title: "The Voyages and Travels of Captains Parry, Franklin, Ross, and Mr. Belzoni"
---

## The Voyages and Travels of Captains Parry, Franklin, Ross, and Mr. Belzoni

**Author:** John Frederick Dennett
**Date:** 1826
**Imprint:** London: Jaques and Wright

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
